error_details.title: Missing spec section: acceptance criteria
error_details.description: The spec.md file does not contain a valid Acceptance Criteria section. Unable to proceed with design phase.
error_details.stacktrace_or_context:
File: specs/my-feature/spec.md
Line: 45
Expected section: Acceptance Criteria
Found: Requirements section only

blocking_points: Cannot define design success criteria without acceptance criteria
Review phase will fail without measurable criteria

fix_suggestions: Add Acceptance Criteria section to spec.md
Define at least 3 testable acceptance criteria
Ensure criteria are measurable and verifiable
